data.scene: User taps the microphone button on the Assist screen or triggers voice input via wake word.
data.purpose: Transcribe voice commands and execute smart home control actions.
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user initiates a voice session)
data.storage: Not stored; audio is discarded after streaming processing
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; voice data is sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Assist screen top-right settings -> Input mode selection

permissions.name: RECORD_AUDIO
permissions.scene: When user first taps the microphone button
permissions.purpose: Record user voice commands for the voice assistant
permissions.impact: If denied, voice input will be unavailable; text input can still be used
